rows.title: 2026年SMART OPTIMIZATION健康检查-Health Check for Smart Optimization in 2026
rows.creator: h84185509
rows.risk_description:
机关联合产品线发布2026年度Smart Optimization年度健康巡检，通过CPT任务推送巡检通知，请各代表处在netcare创建HC巡检任务，并在CPT任务单内上传HC单号以关闭CPT任务。

------------------------------

The HQ and product lines jointly released the 2026 Smart Optimization annual health check. The health check notice is pushed through the CPT task. Each rep office is required to create an HC health check task on NetCare and upload the HC ticket number in the CPT task order to close the CPT task.

For details about how to deploy the BMS server for the customer, see the following guide. In special cases, contact R&D engineers for archiving.
Guide link:
https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/22164460?moduleId=732999204558016512&ctype=-1
HQ contact persons: Song Weitao 00474059, Gao Chi 00873691, Ning Jun 60116618

 

Task Closure Requirements:

case1：Complete the BMS deployment and provide supporting evidence.

case2：If the task is not involved, contact HQ contact person for filing and close the task via the filing confirmation email.

rows.title: 2026 Telecom Cloud Bearer Network Risk Clearance Project-2026年电信云承载网风险消减专项
rows.precaution_title: 2026年电信云承载网风险消减专项
rows.creator: t00803376
rows.risk_description:
[Special background]: In the past two years, more than 20 major issues, such as network accidents, management upgrades, and emergency recovery, have occurred on the Telco Cloud bearer network, and there are still high risks. Based on the value networks where major issues have occurred in the past two years, target networks are selected for this special project.
[Special inspection plan]:
1. The iptoolkit tool is used for data collection, and the solution template matching the live network is used for data collection. (If there are multiple solution scenarios at a site, the corresponding template must be used to collect data separately.)
2. This special inspection integrates the "datacom network health check" and "IP service health evaluation 2.0" (the two "Telco Cloud network scenario" check items are included), aligns the evaluation items in each solution, and adds risk checks such as the availability of the active and standby services.
3. NetCare serves as the entry point for the special inspection (health check module—multiple health check instances need to be created if there are multiple solution scenarios at a site). The "Customized Scenario--2026 Telco Cloud Bearer Network Risk Mitigation Special Project" template is used, and the corresponding scenario template is automatically invoked in the UMC background for risk analysis. (For sites without feedback on the Telco Cloud solution on the live network or on the live network NE data, or sites with multiple solution scenarios, UMC needs to manually select the corresponding scenario and confirm the NE pairing relationship.)

[Special closed-loop solution]:

If one or more datacom products listed in the "Involved Products" section of the current task order (CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) are deployed on the live network, perform the following operations to mitigate risks on the telco cloud transport network.
Note: For details about the operations and closure methods of the task order (CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx), see the attachment in the solution package (NetCare Assurance Task User Guide/NetCare Maintenance Task User Guide).
1. Complete the risk check on the telco cloud transport network by September 30, 2026, and mitigate the risks by December 30, 2026.
2. The closure criteria of the task (CPTxxxxx) are as follows:
2.1. Create a health check order (HCxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) and collect and analyze data of NEs and devices on the telco cloud transport network by referring to the attachment in the solution package (Guide to Collecting and Analyzing Data for Risk Check on the Telco Cloud Transport Network). After the risk check is complete, record the identified risks in the risk database (NRxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) for tracking. When the task is closed, associate the health check order (HCxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) with the task.
2.2. If the IP Toolkit cannot be used for the inspection, the attachment in the solution package (Guide to Manually Collecting and Analyzing Data for Risk Check on the Telco Cloud Transport Network (Offline Collection + UMC)) provides the manual collection and analysis methods. After the risk check is complete, record the identified risks in the risk database. When the task is closed, specify the UMC project name and associate the risk order number (NRxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) with the task.
2.3. If the risk check cannot be completed due to customer reasons (for example, the customer does not allow the inspection or data collection, or the customer does not allow data to be transferred out of the network due to regulatory reasons), the customer must be formally notified of the risks. The email or meeting minutes sent to the customer must be uploaded to the task order (CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) as an attachment to complete the task closure.
2.4. If operations such as configuration adjustment, patch upgrade, and switchover are required to eliminate risks, submit a change request (RFC) for review before performing the operations.
(1) If the customer agrees to the risk check, complete the check and record the identified medium- and high-risk issues in the risk database for tracking.
(2) For risks that can be mitigated by Huawei through parameter configuration or software patch installation, close the maintenance task or risk order in the risk database after the implementation.
(3) For risks that are caused by insufficient performance or outdated hardware and depend on the customer or sales personnel, develop an emergency plan in the risk database, and transfer the risks to the sales personnel through Three Cloud. Then, suspend the risks.

【专项背景】：近两年，电信云承载网络发生事故、管理升级和紧急恢复等重大问题20+起，仍存在较高风险隐患；根据近两年发生过重大问题的价值网络，筛选出目标网络进行专项开展


【专项检查方案】：

1. 数据采集使用iptoolkit工具，采用现网匹配解决方案模板进行数据采集 （如果存在多个解决方案场景局点需要单独使用对应模板分别采集）

2. 专项结合“数通网络健康检查”和“IP业务健康度评估2.0”中两个“电信云网络场景”检查内容，对齐各方案中评估项，新增业务主备可用性等风险核查。

  3. Netcare作为专项检查入口（健康检查模块-如果存在多个解决方案场景局点需要建立多个健康检查），使用“定制场景--2026年电信云承载网风险消减专项”的模板，在UMC后台自动调用对应的场景模板进行风险分析（未反馈现网电信云解决方案/现网网元数据局点和多个解决方案场景局点，需要UMC手动进行对应场景选择和网元成对关系确认）。

【专项闭环方案】：

如果现网部署了本任务单（CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）“涉及产品”目录中列出的一种或多种数通产品，执行以下操作对电信云承载网络风险消减。
注：任务单（CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）的操作和闭环方式，参考方案包中附件（NetCare Assurance Task User Guide / NetCare维护任务使用指导书）

1、2026年9月30日前完成电信云承载网络风险排查，12月30日前完成风险消减。
2、任务（CPTxxxxx）闭环标准：
2.1、创建健康检查单（HCxxxxxxxxxxxxxx），参考方案包中附件 电信云承载网络风险巡检采集分析指导，完成电信云承载网元设备数据采集和分析。风险排查完成后，识别的风险录入风险库（NRxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）跟踪。闭环时需要关联健康检查单（HCxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）。
2.2、如无法使用IP Toolkit进行巡检，方案包中附件电信云承载网络手工采集分析指导(离线采集 + UMC) 提供手工采集和分析方法。风险排查完成，识别的风险录入风险库。闭环时需要备注UMC项目名称、关联风险单号（NRxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）。
2.3、如果因客户原因无法完成风险排查（如客户不允许巡检或采集、法规原因数据不允许出网等），需把风险正式通知客户。通知客户的邮件或会议纪要作为附件，上传到任务单（CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx），完成任务闭环。
2.4、进行风险消除时，如配置调整、补丁升级、倒换操作等，需提交变更单（RFC）评审后再操作。
（1）客户同意风险排查的，完成排查动作，识别的中高风险录入nrisk跟踪；
（2）华为可实施的参数配置、软件补丁类，实施后将维护任务或nrisk风险单关闭；
（3）依赖客户/行销实施的性能不足、硬件老旧等风险，在nrisk制定应急预案、需销售的传递行销三朵云，完成风险挂起；

If one or more datacom products listed in the "Involved Products" section of the current task order (CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) are deployed on the live network, perform the following operations to mitigate risks on the telco cloud transport network.
Note: For details about the operations and closure methods of the task order (CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx), see the attachment in the solution package (NetCare Assurance Task User Guide/NetCare Maintenance Task User Guide).
1. Complete the risk check on the telco cloud transport network by September 30, 2026, and mitigate the risks by December 30, 2026.
2. The closure criteria of the task (CPTxxxxx) are as follows:
2.1. Create a health check order (HCxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) and collect and analyze data of NEs and devices on the telco cloud transport network by referring to the attachment in the solution package (Guide to Collecting and Analyzing Data for Risk Check on the Telco Cloud Transport Network). After the risk check is complete, record the identified risks in the risk database (NRxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) for tracking. When the task is closed, associate the health check order (HCxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) with the task.
2.2. If the IP Toolkit cannot be used for the inspection, the attachment in the solution package (Guide to Manually Collecting and Analyzing Data for Risk Check on the Telco Cloud Transport Network (Offline Collection + UMC)) provides the manual collection and analysis methods. After the risk check is complete, record the identified risks in the risk database. When the task is closed, specify the UMC project name and associate the risk order number (NRxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) with the task.
2.3. If the risk check cannot be completed due to customer reasons (for example, the customer does not allow the inspection or data collection, or the customer does not allow data to be transferred out of the network due to regulatory reasons), the customer must be formally notified of the risks. The email or meeting minutes sent to the customer must be uploaded to the task order (CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx) as an attachment to complete the task closure.
2.4. If operations such as configuration adjustment, patch upgrade, and switchover are required to eliminate risks, submit a change request (RFC) for review before performing the operations.
(1) If the customer agrees to the risk check, complete the check and record the identified medium- and high-risk issues in the risk database for tracking.
(2) For risks that can be mitigated by Huawei through parameter configuration or software patch installation, close the maintenance task or risk order in the risk database after the implementation.
(3) For risks that are caused by insufficient performance or outdated hardware and depend on the customer or sales personnel, develop an emergency plan in the risk database, and transfer the risks to the sales personnel through Three Cloud. Then, suspend the risks.

【专项背景】：近两年，电信云承载网络发生事故、管理升级和紧急恢复等重大问题20+起，仍存在较高风险隐患；根据近两年发生过重大问题的价值网络，筛选出目标网络进行专项开展


【专项检查方案】：

1. 数据采集使用iptoolkit工具，采用现网匹配解决方案模板进行数据采集 （如果存在多个解决方案场景局点需要单独使用对应模板分别采集）

2. 专项结合“数通网络健康检查”和“IP业务健康度评估2.0”中两个“电信云网络场景”检查内容，对齐各方案中评估项，新增业务主备可用性等风险核查。

  3. Netcare作为专项检查入口（健康检查模块-如果存在多个解决方案场景局点需要建立多个健康检查），使用“定制场景--2026年电信云承载网风险消减专项”的模板，在UMC后台自动调用对应的场景模板进行风险分析（未反馈现网电信云解决方案/现网网元数据局点和多个解决方案场景局点，需要UMC手动进行对应场景选择和网元成对关系确认）。

【专项闭环方案】：

如果现网部署了本任务单（CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）“涉及产品”目录中列出的一种或多种数通产品，执行以下操作对电信云承载网络风险消减。
注：任务单（CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）的操作和闭环方式，参考方案包中附件（NetCare Assurance Task User Guide / NetCare维护任务使用指导书）

1、2026年9月30日前完成电信云承载网络风险排查，12月30日前完成风险消减。
2、任务（CPTxxxxx）闭环标准：
2.1、创建健康检查单（HCxxxxxxxxxxxxxx），参考方案包中附件 电信云承载网络风险巡检采集分析指导，完成电信云承载网元设备数据采集和分析。风险排查完成后，识别的风险录入风险库（NRxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）跟踪。闭环时需要关联健康检查单（HCxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）。
2.2、如无法使用IP Toolkit进行巡检，方案包中附件电信云承载网络手工采集分析指导(离线采集 + UMC) 提供手工采集和分析方法。风险排查完成，识别的风险录入风险库。闭环时需要备注UMC项目名称、关联风险单号（NRxxxxxxxxxxxxxx）。
2.3、如果因客户原因无法完成风险排查（如客户不允许巡检或采集、法规原因数据不允许出网等），需把风险正式通知客户。通知客户的邮件或会议纪要作为附件，上传到任务单（CPTxxxxxxxxxxxxxx），完成任务闭环。
2.4、进行风险消除时，如配置调整、补丁升级、倒换操作等，需提交变更单（RFC）评审后再操作。
（1）客户同意风险排查的，完成排查动作，识别的中高风险录入nrisk跟踪；
（2）华为可实施的参数配置、软件补丁类，实施后将维护任务或nrisk风险单关闭；
（3）依赖客户/行销实施的性能不足、硬件老旧等风险，在nrisk制定应急预案、需销售的传递行销三朵云，完成风险挂起；

３.预案(STxxxxxx)和演练任务(NCxxxx 或 ADxxxxx)全部完成后，CPTxxxx 任务即可关闭。预案模板、实验室演练场景ID等，请参考方案包链接：https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/22132572?l=zh-cn&moduleId=732999204558016512&ctype=-1

rows.title: 2026 Cloud Core Network TOPN task-BFD Deployment Check
rows.precaution_title: 2026年云核心网专项方案：BFD部署排查
rows.creator: q00238782
rows.risk_description:
1. Convergent data: Check the BFD configuration by following the instructions provided in "Checking BFD Configurations" in the Precaution Notice [2025] No.127 - Link Reliability Deterioration Caused by Improper BFD and BGP Configurations on the UDM and UPCF Outside the China Region. Compare the information with the network design LLD.
(1) Enter the number of involved NEs on the Edit Product page based on the actual number of NEs on the live network.
(2) If the live network setting does not meet the network design requirements, work with Data Communication to formulate an implementation solution. After the implementation is complete, upload the network design LLD and check result in the task, associate the RFC with the task, and submit the solution for review.
(3) If the live network setting meets the network design requirements and does not need to be modified, upload the network design LLD and check result in the task and submit it for review.
Pre-caution SC2200019861 link: https://support.huawei.com/carrier/docview?nid=SC2200019861&path=PBI1-21262245/PBI1-7899527/PBI1-252303919
2.PS: Check the BFD configuration according to the BFD ARP LACP precaution check using inspection tool and compare it with the network design LLD.
(1) Click Edit Product to fill in the number of involved NEs based on the number of products involved in SC2200019722 and the actual number of NEs on the live network.
(2) If the live network setting does not meet the network design requirements, work with Data Communication to formulate an implementation solution. After the implementation is complete, upload the network design LLD and check result in the task, associate the RFC with the task, and submit the solution for review.
(3) If the live network setting meets the network design requirements and does not need to be modified, upload the network design LLD and check result in the task and submit it for review.
Link to the guide: https:3ms.huawei.comkmgroups2029139blogsdetails21608552?l=zh-cn&moduleId=1128544310143401984
Pre-caution SC2200019722 link:https://support.huawei.com/carrier/docview?nid=SC2200019722&path=PBI1-21262245/PBI1-7899527/PBI1-22892303

rows.title: 2026 Cloud Core Network TOPN task-BFD Deployment Check
rows.precaution_title: 2026年云核心网专项方案：BFD部署排查
rows.creator: q00238782
rows.risk_description:
1. Convergent data: Check the BFD configuration by following the instructions provided in "Checking BFD Configurations" in the Precaution Notice [2025] No.127 - Link Reliability Deterioration Caused by Improper BFD and BGP Configurations on the UDM and UPCF Outside the China Region. Compare the information with the network design LLD.
(1) Enter the number of involved NEs on the Edit Product page based on the actual number of NEs on the live network.
(2) If the live network setting does not meet the network design requirements, work with Data Communication to formulate an implementation solution. After the implementation is complete, upload the network design LLD and check result in the task, associate the RFC with the task, and submit the solution for review.
(3) If the live network setting meets the network design requirements and does not need to be modified, upload the network design LLD and check result in the task and submit it for review.

(2) If the live network setting does not meet the network design requirements, work with Data Communication to formulate an implementation solution. rows.precaution_title: 【核心机房锂电风险消减】【Plan B】 核心机房逃生工具包部署
rows.creator: g00873691
rows.risk_description:
[Handling Method]

Rep office locally procure the emergency tool kit for the core equipment room and complete its deployment in the core equipment rooms where lithium batteries are used by the customer.

List of emergency tool kit is detailed in the website link.

[Closed-loop Evidence] Provide photos of the emergency tool kit deployed at the customer's site.

[Task Deadline]  2026-03-30

【处置方法】

 本地采购核心机房逃生工具包，并在客户存在锂电的核心机房完成部署。

工具包清单详见链接网站上的附件。

【任务截止时间】2026年3月30日

【闭环举证】提供在客户处部署逃生工具包的照片。

rows.title: Risk Investigation of Service Disruption Triggered by Unsupported IPv6 Packets Received by Routers in Specific Scenarios 关于路由器在特定场景下收到不支持的IPv6报文触发业务受损风险排查
rows.precaution_title: 关于路由器在特定场景下收到不支持的IPv6报文触发业务受损风险排查
rows.creator: l00203087
rows.risk_description:
[Disposal Method] :
1. Investigate whether the current network involves MPAC data configuration.
Investigation Plan 1 (Recommended): Use inspection tools to investigate, refer to "IPv6 Early Warning Collection and Analysis Guide (IP Toolkit + UMC)".
Investigation Plan 2 (Manual):
1.2.1) Execute the display version command under the user view to check if the device has any issues. The following versions are involved:
1.2.1.1) ATN&NE40E&CX600&ME60&NE8000&NE9000&NE20E&PTN6900&NetEngine A800: All versions of V800
1.2.1.2) ATN: All versions of V300
1.2.2) Execute display current-configuration under the user view to check for service-security policy ipv6 configuration. If present, there is a risk.
<HUAWEI>display current-configuration | include service-security
service-security policy ipv6 test1 //test1 is an example configuration name for MPAC IPv6 policy
2. If the current network devices have MPAC data configuration, provide feedback on the number of involved devices in the task progress, and track until the risk reduction is completed, then close the investigation task.
Risk reduction closure standard: Execute the preventive measures in the early warning or complete the upgrade of the current network devices according to the rectification requirements (rectification plan released online on August 10).
3. If the current network devices are not configured with MPAC, it is not involved. Provide feedback that it is not involved, and the investigation task can be directly closed.
If there are any questions during the risk investigation process, please contact the R&D interface person Wu Haimin at 00483639.

【处置方法】：
1、    排查现网是否涉及MPAC数据配置，
排查方案1（推荐）：通过巡检工具排查，参考《IPv6预警的采集和分析指导 (IP Toolkit + UMC)》
排查方案2（手工）：
             1.2.1）在用户视图下执行display version命令，查看设备是否存在问题。下列版本涉及：
                       1.2.1.1） ATN&NE40E&CX600&ME60&NE8000&NE9000&NE20E&PTN6900&NetEngine A800:V800所有版本
                       1.2.1.2）ATN:V300所有版本
            1.2.2) 在用户视图执行display current-configuration，查看有service-security policy ipv6配置，有则存在风险。
                  <HUAWEI>display current-configuration | include service-security 
                    service-security policy ipv6 test1  //test1是举例配置MPAC IPv6策略名
2、如果现网设备有MPAC数据配置，在任务进展中反馈涉及设备数量，并跟踪到风险消减完成，再闭环排查任务。
风险消减闭环标准：执行完成预警中的预防措施或者根据整改要求完成现网设备升级（整改计划8月10日发布上网）。
3、  如果现网设备未配置MPAC，则不涉及，反馈不涉及，排查任务可以直接闭环。 

如果在风险排查过程中有任何疑问，请联系研发接口人吴海民 00483639

rows.title: Risk Investigation of Service Disruption Triggered by Unsupported IPv6 Packets Received by Routers in Specific Scenarios 关于路由器在特定场景下收到不支持的IPv6报文触发业务受损风险排查
rows.precaution_title: 关于路由器在特定场景下收到不支持的IPv6报文触发业务受损风险排查
rows.creator: l00203087
rows.risk_description:
[Disposal Method] :
1. Investigate whether the current network involves MPAC data configuration.
Investigation Plan 1 (Recommended): Use inspection tools to investigate, refer to "IPv6 Early Warning Collection and Analysis Guide (IP Toolkit + UMC)".
Investigation Plan 2 (Manual):
1.2.1) Execute the display version command under the user view to check if the device has any issues. The following versions are involved:
1.2.1.1) ATN&NE40E&CX600&ME60&NE8000&NE9000&NE20E&PTN6900&NetEngine A800: All versions of V800
1.2.1.2) ATN: All versions of V300
1.2.2) Execute display current-configuration under the user view to check for service-security policy ipv6 configuration. If present, there is a risk.
<HUAWEI>display current-configuration | include service-security
service-security policy ipv6 test1 //test1 is an example configuration name for MPAC IPv6 policy
2. If the current network devices have MPAC data configuration, provide feedback on the number of involved devices in the task progress, and track until the risk reduction is completed, then close the investigation task.
Risk reduction closure standard: Execute the preventive measures in the early warning or complete the upgrade of the current network devices according to the rectification requirements (rectification plan released online on August 10).
3. If the current network devices are not configured with MPAC, it is not involved. Provide feedback that it is not involved, and the investigation task can be directly closed.
If there are any questions during the risk investigation process, please contact the R&D interface person Wu Haimin at 00483639.

【处置方法】：
1、    排查现网是否涉及MPAC数据配置，
排查方案1（推荐）：通过巡检工具排查，参考《IPv6预警的采集和分析指导 (IP Toolkit + UMC)》
排查方案2（手工）：
             1.2.1）在用户视图下执行display version命令，查看设备是否存在问题。下列版本涉及：
                       1.2.1.1） ATN&NE40E&CX600&ME60&NE8000&NE9000&NE20E&PTN6900&NetEngine A800:V800所有版本
                       1.2.1.2）ATN:V300所有版本
            1.2.2) 在用户视图执行display current-configuration，查看有service-security policy ipv6配置，有则存在风险。
                  <HUAWEI>display current-configuration | include service-security 
                    service-security policy ipv6 test1  //test1是举例配置MPAC IPv6策略名
2、如果现网设备有MPAC数据配置，在任务进展中反馈涉及设备数量，并跟踪到风险消减完成，再闭环排查任务。
风险消减闭环标准：执行完成预警中的预防措施或者根据整改要求完成现网设备升级（整改计划8月10日发布上网）。
3、  如果现网设备未配置MPAC，则不涉及，反馈不涉及，排查任务可以直接闭环。 

如果在风险排查过程中有任何疑问，请联系研发接口人吴海民 00483639

3. Close the assurance task after the contingency plan and drill task are completed. For details about the contingency plan template, MOP template, and lab drill scenario ID, please refer to https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/18310545?moduleId=732999204558016512
4..! Please note that the iLab environment is not ready yet because thtis Drill Scenario was officially released in end of April 2025. It is recommended that the drill be implemented after May 2025. The drill ID and contingency plan template ID will be separately notified to the HQ Zhangwang (employee ID: 00592590) When iLab is ready.

rows.product_line: 数据中心能源及关键供电
rows.title: Risks of Site Disconnection If the NetEco BBUConnectorService Certificate Expires
rows.precaution_title: 关于NetEco产品BBUConnectorService证书过期将导致站点断连的风险
rows.creator: y00481579
rows.risk_description:
【Trigger conditions】
The following affected versions , exist in-band channel sites. The BBUConnectorService does not replace the customer certificate and uses the Huawei pre-installed certificate. The preconfigured certificate is not replaced, and the preconfigured certificate expires.
Affected Version：
V600R022C00
V600R022C10
V600R023C00
V600R024C10
V600R024C20
V600R024C30

[Symptom]
After the BBUConnectorService certificate expires, the in-band channel between the NetEco and the base station is disconnected and cannot be reconnected. The in-band channel site is disconnected.
1. The certificate expiration time is 18:56 on January 7, 2027. After the certificate expires, the Certificate Expired alarm is generated
2. If the in-band channel site whose in-band channel connection mode is SSL is disconnected, the connection test result is Other errors.

rows.title: 2025 Risk of Wireless Digital Certificate Expiration-OSS(MAE，U2000)
rows.precaution_title: 2025无线数字证书到期风险-网管（MAE，U2000）
rows.creator: f00199581
rows.risk_description:
【Problem Description】
The earliest expiration date for the OSS certificates is March 9, 2027. Certificate expiration will cause interconnection failures between NEs and the OSS, northbound systems and the OSS, or OSS subsystems. If the FusionSphere OpenStack certificates expire, the FusionSphere OpenStack web client and the FusionSphere OpenStack Management Console cannot be accessed, and FusionSphere OpenStack services are abnormal. In this case, the VMs keep running, but their lifecycle management operations become unavailable.
【Task Handling】
1. check involved NE amount according to product precaution, update the "involved NE" of this CPT task.
2. Link network change ticket to this task, update progress, close the task after replace certificate.

rows.title: Datacom Frame-shaped Device Rectification Clearance/数通框式整改风险清理
rows.precaution_title: 数通框式整改风险清理
rows.creator: z00211079
rows.risk_description:
Background: Major faults occur on the live network caused by multiple known problems due to factors such as inaccurate IBMS data and missing rectification implementation. To eliminate risks that need to be rectified, this project is developed

Special Solution: Sort out the rectifications released in Datacom domain in the past three years, to match IBMS inventory, UMC risks and RFC, identify the list of suspected sites that have not been rectified, and track and clear the sites through this special maintenance tasks

Closure Condition:

For NEs that have been rectified on the live network:
1. If the NE information is consistent with that in the IBMS, can close the CPT task directly. Remark as "The NEs have been rectified and the IBMS has been updated". The closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the current IB information in the CPT task

2. If the NE information is inconsistent with that in the IBMS, the IBMS needs to be updated. The closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the updated IB information in the CPT task

For NEs that have not been rectified on the live network:
1. If the customer agree to implement the rectification, complete the rectification in 2025 and update the IBMS.
(1) If Huawei implements the rectification with RCxxx ticket, the closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload the updated IB information screenshot in the CPT task

(2) If Huawei implements the rectification without RCxxx ticket, the closure condition is to associate the RFC ticket in the CPT task and upload the updated IB information screenshot in the CPT task

(3) If customer implements the rectification, the closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the updated IB information in the CPT task

2. If the customer does not agree to the rectification, obtain effective record filing documents and associate the RCxxx ticket. The closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload effective record filing documents in the CPT task

3.If the rectification is delayed to 2026, create RCxxx ticket，obtain effective record filing documents and associate the RCxxx ticket. The closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload effective record filing documents in the CPT task，the rectification will be managed as a routine delay at 2026

For NEs that have been offline from the live network: Can close the CPT task directly. Remark as "The NEs have been already offline" and delete the corresponding IBMS inventory information. There is no closure condition


If you have any questions about inspection and risk clearance, contact Zhang Lei (employee ID: 00556734)




专项背景：因IBMS数据不准、整改实施遗漏等因素，导致现网发生多起已知问题引发的现网重大故障，为清理整改应做未做的风险，特开展本专项

专项方案：梳理数通近三年发布的整改，多维度匹配IBMS存量/巡检风险/Netcare变更单，识别出“疑似”未整改局点清单，并通过“专项维护任务”跟踪清理

闭环条件：

对于在网且现网已整改的网元：
1.如果网元信息和IBMS一致，直接闭环，闭环时备注“已整改，且IBMS已刷新”，闭环条件是在CPT风险流程上传当前IB信息截图

rows.precaution_title: 数通框式整改风险清理
rows.creator: z00211079
rows.risk_description:
Background: Major faults occur on the live network caused by multiple known problems due to factors such as inaccurate IBMS data and missing rectification implementation. To eliminate risks that need to be rectified, this project is developed

Special Solution: Sort out the rectifications released in Datacom domain in the past three years, to match IBMS inventory, UMC risks and RFC, identify the list of suspected sites that have not been rectified, and track and clear the sites through this special maintenance tasks

Closure Condition:

For NEs that have been rectified on the live network:
1. If the NE information is consistent with that in the IBMS, can close the CPT task directly. Remark as "The NEs have been rectified and the IBMS has been updated". The closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the current IB information in the CPT task

2. If the NE information is inconsistent with that in the IBMS, the IBMS needs to be updated. The closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the updated IB information in the CPT task

For NEs that have not been rectified on the live network:
1. If the customer agree to implement the rectification, complete the rectification in 2025 and update the IBMS.
(1) If Huawei implements the rectification with RCxxx ticket, the closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload the updated IB information screenshot in the CPT task

(2) If Huawei implements the rectification without RCxxx ticket, the closure condition is to associate the RFC ticket in the CPT task and upload the updated IB information screenshot in the CPT task

(3) If customer implements the rectification, the closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the updated IB information in the CPT task

2. If the customer does not agree to the rectification, obtain effective record filing documents and associate the RCxxx ticket. The closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload effective record filing documents in the CPT task

3.If the rectification is delayed to 2026, create RCxxx ticket，obtain effective record filing documents and associate the RCxxx ticket. The closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload effective record filing documents in the CPT task，the rectification will be managed as a routine delay at 2026

For NEs that have been offline from the live network: Can close the CPT task directly. Remark as "The NEs have been already offline" and delete the corresponding IBMS inventory information. There is no closure condition

rows.title: 2025 Software Product NGIN Service SNE Component Initial Certificate Risk Mitigation
rows.precaution_title: 2025年软件产品NGIN业务SNE组件初始证书风险消减专项
rows.creator: l84263029
rows.risk_description:
1. After the certificate for the SYSSOAPAdapter of the SNE to connect to the DigitalView expires, the connection between the SNE and DigitalView and iCnfg is affected, and the configuration management function in the DigitalView and iCnfg cannot be used.
2. After the certificates for the SYSSOAPAdapter of the SNE to connect to the iPortal and JavaBMP expire, the iPortal and JavaBMP cannot be used for registration and deregistration management.
3. After the certificates of the SOAPAdapter, DiamAdapter, and HTTPPlusAdapter of the SNE for connecting to the third-party BOSS and OCS expire, registration, deregistration, and call services are affected.

rows.title: 2025 Software Product OCS/CBS Service SNE Component Initial Certificate Risk Mitigation
rows.precaution_title: 2025年软件产品OCS/CBS业务SNE组件初始证书风险消减专项
rows.creator: l84263029
rows.risk_description:
1. The SYSSOAPAdapter certificate of the embedded platform SNE of the OCG will expire from June 2027 to June 2041. The connection between the DigitalView and iCnfg is affected, and the configuration management function on the DigitalView and iCnfg cannot be used. When the SYSSOAPAdapter connects to the BMPAPP, configuration data synchronization on the GUI is affected.
2. The SOAPAdapter certificate of the embedded platform SNE of the OCG will expire from June 2027 to June 2041, affecting service functions such as registration and deregistration of the BMPAPP. The SOAPAdapter connects to the third-party OCG or the OCG accesses the third-party OCG. Services are affected.

rows.creator: l84263029
rows.risk_description:

rows.title: 2025 Hybrid Video Certificate Risk Mitigation
rows.precaution_title: 2025年融合视频存量证书风险消减专项
rows.creator: l00287791
rows.risk_description:
The following certificates are used. After the certificate expires, alarms may be generated, unreachable to the NMS, or services may be affected.
Multiple certificates (such as RootCA.pem.cer, lb.keystore, tomcatKeyStore, and UniversecertChain.jks) of multiple components of the Envision Video Platform & CDN products.
Multiple certificates (such as signing_cert.pem, uniagent_ca.pem, and cmp.keystore) of the DigitalView product.
Multiple certificates (such as FusionSphere OpenStack class-A certificates, OM class-A certificates, FusionSphere OpenStack SSL certificates, and OM HA certificates) of FusionSphere OpenStack.
Multiple certificates (such as root-ca.crt and server.crt) of FusionInsight.
Note:
1. Number of risky NEs: The Envision Video Platform/CDN calculates the number of NEs based on the number of planned operation windows for performing certificate replacement tasks. Calculate the number of DigitalView/FusionSphere/FusionInsight NEs based on the actual number of DigitalView/FusionSphere/FusionInsight NEs on the live network.
2. If the product involved in the task does not involve certificate risks, change the value of Involved NEs to 0. Upload the check certificate when the problem is closed.

rows.title: Risk Check and Clearance for S Series Switches in South Africa and North Africa-南北非区域S交换机巡检排查&风险清理专项
rows.precaution_title: 南北非区域S交换机巡检排查&风险清理专项
rows.creator: z00600741
rows.risk_description:
If one or more types of S series switches which listed in the 'Involved Product' directory of this task order, are deployed on the live network, should perform the following operations:
1、Complete the risk check for S series switches before September 30, 2024 and complete risk mitigation before December 30, 2024.
2、Closure criteria for the elimination task:
a. Create a health check ticket（HCxxxxxx） and complete data collection and analysis of the firewall two-node cluster network by referring to the attachment (Firewall Hot Standby Collection and Analysis Guide (IP Toolkit + UMC)) in the solution package. After the risk check is complete, the identified risks should be recorded in Netcare. When the task is closed, the health check ticket number and risk ticket number must be associated.
b. If the risk check cannot be completed due to customer reasons, (For example, the customer does not allow inspection or collection, or data cannot be exported due to laws and regulations.) The customer must be formally notified of the risk. Notify the customer of the email or meeting minutes as evidence to close the task.
Note: When eliminating risks, such as configuration adjustment, patch upgrade, and switchover, submit an RFC for review before performing operations.
3. If you have any questions about Inspection Check & Risk Clearance, please contact liulin 00809079；If you have any suggestions or questions about the task, please contact zhangchaoqun 00600741.

如果现网部署了本任务令的“涉及产品”目录中列出的一种或多种S交换机，则需要执行以下操作:
1、2024年09月30日前完成S交换机风险排查，12月30日前完成风险消减.
2、清零任务闭环标准：
a、创建健康检查单，参考方案包中附件（IP Toolkit V100R024C10SPC100 数据采集 用户指南 1.3），完成S交换机的数据采集和分析。风险排查完成后，识别的中高级别风险都需要关注并跟踪闭环。闭环时需要关联健康检查单。
b、如果因客户原因无法完成风险排查（如客户不允许巡检或采集、法规原因数据不允许出网等），需把风险正式通知客户。通知客户的邮件或会议纪要作为证据，完成任务闭环。
提醒：进行风险消除时，如配置调整、补丁升级、倒换操作等，需提交变更单（RFC）评审后再操作。
3、如果您对巡检排查和风险清理有疑问，请联系柳林 00809079；如果您对任务有任何建议和疑问，请联系张超群 00600741。

rows.risk_description:
If one or more types of S series switches which listed in the 'Involved Product' directory of this task order, are deployed on the live network, should perform the following operations:
1、Complete the risk check for S series switches before September 30, 2024 and complete risk mitigation before December 30, 2024.
2、Closure criteria for the elimination task:
a. Create a health check ticket（HCxxxxxx） and complete data collection and analysis of the firewall two-node cluster network by referring to the attachment (Firewall Hot Standby Collection and Analysis Guide (IP Toolkit + UMC)) in the solution package. After the risk check is complete, the identified risks should be recorded in Netcare. When the task is closed, the health check ticket number and risk ticket number must be associated.
b. If the risk check cannot be completed due to customer reasons, (For example, the customer does not allow inspection or collection, or data cannot be exported due to laws and regulations.) The customer must be formally notified of the risk. Notify the customer of the email or meeting minutes as evidence to close the task.
Note: When eliminating risks, such as configuration adjustment, patch upgrade, and switchover, submit an RFC for review before performing operations.
3. If you have any questions about Inspection Check & Risk Clearance, please contact liulin 00809079；If you have any suggestions or questions about the task, please contact zhangchaoqun 00600741.

如果现网部署了本任务令的“涉及产品”目录中列出的一种或多种S交换机，则需要执行以下操作:
1、2024年09月30日前完成S交换机风险排查，12月30日前完成风险消减.
2、清零任务闭环标准：
a、创建健康检查单，参考方案包中附件（IP Toolkit V100R024C10SPC100 数据采集 用户指南 1.3），完成S交换机的数据采集和分析。风险排查完成后，识别的中高级别风险都需要关注并跟踪闭环。闭环时需要关联健康检查单。
b、如果因客户原因无法完成风险排查（如客户不允许巡检或采集、法规原因数据不允许出网等），需把风险正式通知客户。通知客户的邮件或会议纪要作为证据，完成任务闭环。
提醒：进行风险消除时，如配置调整、补丁升级、倒换操作等，需提交变更单（RFC）评审后再操作。
3、如果您对巡检排查和风险清理有疑问，请联系柳林 00809079；如果您对任务有任何建议和疑问，请联系张超群 00600741。

rows.title: Risk warning of Expiration of Preset Certificates on Huawei Servers——华为服务器预置证书过期风险预警
rows.precaution_title: 华为服务器预置证书过期风险预警
rows.creator: h84185509
rows.risk_description:
The preset SSL certificate of iBMC earlier than 253 (excluded) and iBMC 663 will expire on July 22, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of E9000 management module (MM910) firmware earlier than 690 (excluded) will expire on February 20, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of all versions of 9008 V5 (supporting CMC)/9032/9016/9008 server chassis management modules (KunLun CMC) will expire on February 20, 2024. After the software certificates expire, the WebUI and Redfish functions can be used properly. Some software or versions will report alarms.
If certificate validity period verification is enabled on the customer's network management system (NMS), the device may be out of management.

iBMC 253(不包含)之前和663版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年7月22日过期；E9000管理板MM910固件版本690(不包含)之前版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年2月20日过期；9008 V5（Support CMC）/9032/9016/9008服务器机框管理板Kunlun CMC所有版本使用的预置SSL证书2024年2月20日过期。这些软件的证书过期后，web和redfish功能均可以正常使用，部分软件或版本会上报告警。如果客户网管开启了证书有效期校验，可能有脱管风险。

rows.title: Storage Product Certificate Expiration Risk Mitigation Project in 2024-2024年存储产品证书到期风险消减专项
rows.precaution_title: 2024年存储产品证书到期风险消减专项
rows.creator: h84185509
rows.risk_description:
In 2024, the risk of pre-installed certificate expiration of storage products is explosive. After the pre-installed certificate expires, alarms indicating that the storage certificate is about to expire or has expired will be reported, which may affect some functions and further affect upper-layer services. There are two certificate risks；
Complete risk mitigation before June 30, 2024 for contracts that will expire in 2024 and before December 30, 2024 for contracts that will expire in 2025 or 2026.
1，[CIT-P-202404]Warning of Expiration for Preset iBMC Certificates of Storage Product Servers；
2，[CIT-P-202410] Notice on Prewarning for Expiration Risk of Certificates in Storage Products；
Check risks based on the precaution and the information contained in the risk elimination solution package to ensure that all risks are eliminated.
而影响上层业务，此专项包含两个证书风险；
24年到期的在24年6月30日前完成风险消减，25&26年到期的在24年12月30日前完成风险消减：
1，【CIT-P-202404】关于存储产品服务器iBMC预置证书过期风险的预警通知；
2，【CIT-P-202410】关于存储产品证书过期风险的预警通知；
还请根据预警正文信息和风险消除方案包内内包含的各项信息进行风险排查，确保风险清零；

rows.title: 2024 OCS&CBS&VDS Product Certificate Risk Mitigation/2024年OCS&CBS&VDS产品证书风险消减专项
rows.precaution_title: 2024年软件业务证书风险消减专项
rows.creator: l84263029
rows.risk_description:
1.OCS&CBS&VDS部分局点预置证书将在2026年12月30日过期
2.证书过期，向DV上报证书过期告警，业务不受影响
3.请参考《A&S421-20240415-关于OCS&CBS产品以及VDS产品初始证书过期风险的预警通知》排查；
4.经排查若涉及证书过期，在任务中关联风险作业单，根据任务闭环条件完成后提交评审；
5.经排查若不涉及证书过期，按一线实际情况编辑涉及产品网元数为0，提交闭环；

1. Preconfigured certificates for some OCS, CBS, and VDS sites will expire on December 30, 2026.
2. When the certificate expires, a certificate expiration alarm is reported to the DigitalView. Services are not affected.
3. For details, see the A&S421-20240415-Precaution Notice on the Risk of Initial Certificate Expiration of OCS&CBS and VDS Products.
4. If the certificate expires, associate the risk work order with the task and submit the work order for review after the task is closed based on the task closure conditions.
5. If certificate expiration is not involved, change the number of involved NEs to 0 based on the site requirements and submit the issue for closure.

rows.title: 2024 emergency drill/2024应急演练
rows.creator: f00197364
rows.risk_description:
Based on the survive drill test in 2024, the front line needs to develop a contingency plan and perform the drill test.
1.The contingency plan：Develop a contingency plan online, after a contingency plan is created, associate with a sub-task (STxxx).
2.The survive drill: It is recommended that the drill be performed on the live network or in the lab. After the drill is complete, associate it with an RFC ticket (NCxxx) or drill a ticket (ADxxx). Suggested scenarios is bypass.
3.Close the assurance task after the contingency plan and drill task are completed.

基于2024年演练任务，需要一线制作应急预案并进行演练。
1. 应急预案：使用在线方式制作应急预案。预案制作完成后关联子任务单号（ST单）；
2. 逃生演练：演练建议在现网/实验室进行，演练完成后请关联变更单号（NC单）或者演练单号（AD单）；建议场景为放通演练
３. 预案和演练任务全部完成后即可关闭维护任务。

rows.title: Datacom firewall HA reliability hardening project in 2024 / 2024年数通防火墙双机可靠性加固专项
rows.precaution_title: 2024年数通防火墙双机可靠性加固专项
rows.creator: r00209145
rows.risk_description:
If one or more types of firewalls which listed in the 'Involved Product' directory of this task order, are deployed on the live network, should perform the following operations to harden the reliability of the firewall two-node cluster.

1、Complete the risk check of the firewall HA system before September 30, 2024 and complete risk mitigation before December 30, 2024.
2、Closure criteria for the elimination task:
a. Create a health check ticket（HCxxxxxx） and complete data collection and analysis of the firewall two-node cluster network by referring to the attachment (Firewall Hot Standby Collection and Analysis Guide (IP Toolkit + UMC)) in the solution package. After the risk check is complete, the identified risks should be recorded in Netcare. When the task is closed, the health check ticket number and risk ticket number must be associated.
b. If the IP Toolkit cannot be used for inspection, the attachment (Firewall Hot Standby Collection and Analysis Guide (IP Toolkit + UMC)) in the solution package provides manual collection and analysis methods. After the risk check is complete, the identified risks should be recorded in Netcare. In closed-loop management, remark the UMC project name and associated risk ticket number.
c. If the risk check cannot be completed due to customer reasons, (For example, the customer does not allow inspection or collection, or data cannot be exported due to laws and regulations.) The customer must be formally notified of the risk. Notify the customer of the email or meeting minutes as evidence to close the task.
Note: When eliminating risks, such as configuration adjustment, patch upgrade, and switchover, submit an RFC for review before performing operations.
3.If you have any suggestions or questions about the task, please contact renshiqi 00549633 or wuhaimin 00483639.


如果现网部署了本任务令的“涉及产品”目录中列出的一种或多种防火墙，则需要执行以下操作对防火墙双机进行可靠性加固。

1、2024年9月30日前完成防火墙双机风险排查，12月30日前完成风险消减。
2、清零任务闭环标准：
a、创建健康检查单，参考方案包中附件（umc防火墙双机采集分析指导），完成防火墙双机组网的数据采集和分析。风险排查完成后，识别的风险录入风险库。闭环时需要关联健康检查单及风险单号。
b、如无法使用IP Toolkit进行巡检，方案包中附件（umc防火墙双机采集分析指导）提供手工采集和分析方法。风险排查完成，识别的风险录入风险库。闭环时需要备注UMC项目名称、关联风险单号。
c、如果因客户原因无法完成风险排查（如客户不允许巡检或采集、法规原因数据不允许出网等），需把风险正式通知客户。通知客户的邮件或会议纪要作为证据，完成任务闭环。
提醒：进行风险消除时，如配置调整、补丁升级、倒换操作等，需提交变更单（RFC）评审后再操作。
3、如果您对任务有任何建议和疑问，请联系 任世奇 00549633 或 吴海民 00483639

rows.title: 2024 Survival Drill Task / 2024年逃生预案演练任务
rows.creator: l00287791
rows.risk_description:
Based on the survive drill test in 2024, the front line needs to develop a online contingency plan and perform the drill test.
1.The contingency plan：Develop a contingency plan online. After a contingency plan is created, associate with a sub-task (STxxx).
2.The survive drill: It is recommended that the drill be performed on the live network. After the drill is complete, associate it with an RFC ticket (NCxxx) or drill a ticket (ADxxx).
3.Close the assurance task after the contingency plan and drill task are completed. For details about the contingency plan template, MOP template, and lab drill scenario ID, please refer to
https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/15205704?l=zh-cn&moduleId=732999204558016512.

基于2024年逃生预案演练任务，需要一线制作应急预案并进行演练。
1. 应急预案：使用在线方式制作应急预案，预案制作完成后关联子任务单号（ST单）；
2. 逃生演练：演练建议在现网/实验室进行，演练完成后请关联变更单号（NC单）或者演练单号（AD单）；
3. 预案和演练任务全部完成后即可关闭维护任务。预案模板、MOP模板和实验室演练场景ID等方案包请参考
https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/15205704?l=zh-cn&moduleId=732999204558016512

rows.title: Risk warning of Expiration of Preset Certificates on Huawei Servers-华为服务器预置证书过期风险预警
rows.precaution_title: 华为服务器预置证书过期风险预警
rows.creator: h84185509
rows.risk_description:
The preset SSL certificate of iBMC earlier than 253 (excluded) and iBMC 663 will expire on July 22, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of E9000 management module (MM910) firmware earlier than 690 (excluded) will expire on February 20, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of all versions of 9008 V5 (supporting CMC)/9032/9016/9008 server chassis management modules (KunLun CMC) will expire on February 20, 2024. After the software certificates expire, the WebUI and Redfish functions can be used properly. Some software or versions will report alarms.
If certificate validity period verification is enabled on the customer's network management system (NMS), the device may be out of management.
iBMC 253(不包含)之前和663版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年7月22日过期；E9000管理板MM910固件版本690(不包含)之前版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年2月20日过期；9008 V5（Support CMC）/9032/9016/9008服务器机框管理板Kunlun CMC所有版本使用的预置SSL证书2024年2月20日过期。这些软件的证书过期后，web和redfish功能均可以正常使用，部分软件或版本会上报告警。如果客户网管开启了证书有效期校验，可能有脱管风险。

rows.title: 2024 Software Service FusionSphere Product Certificate Risk Mitigation Special-2024年软件业务FusionSphere产品证书风险消减专项
rows.precaution_title: 2024年软件业务FusionSphere产品证书风险消减专项
rows.creator: l84263029
rows.risk_description:
Note:
1. The FusionSphere creates tasks for all software products on the entire network by country and customer network. During the check, you need to check all products (such as CBS/Mobile Money/AAA/VDS/BES/CRM/IPCC & CSP/AICC/EVC/IPTrace).
2. The certificate of installed base software FusionSphere products expires in 2020. The reduction must be completed by December 31, 2024.
3. For details, see the A&S412-20240321 Warning About the Expiration Risks of the PKI Certificate and Other Certificates of the NFV_FusionSphere of the IT Auxiliary.
4. If the certificate expires, associate the risk work order with the task and submit the work order for review after the task is closed based on the task closure conditions.
5. If the certificate expiration is not involved, delete the IBMS device document and report that the certificate expiration is not involved. Then cancel the work order.

说明：
1.FusionSphere是以国家&客户网络为单位给全网所有软件产品创建任务，排查时需要排查所有产品（CBS/Mobile Money/AAA/VDS/BES/CRM/IPCC & CSP/AICC/EVC/IPTrace）
2.2025年软件存量FusionSphere产品证书过期，要求100%完成消减，任务完成时间为2024年12月31日；
3.请参考《A&S412-20240321-关于软件业务产品集成的FusionSphere组件预置证书即将到期的预警通知》排查；
4.若涉及证书过期，在任务中关联风险作业单，根据任务闭环条件完成后提交闭环评审；
5.若不涉及证书过期，请删除IBMS设备文档并反馈不涉及；

rows.title: 2024年存储产品证书到期风险消减专项
rows.precaution_title: 2024年存储产品证书到期风险消减专项
rows.creator: h84185509
rows.risk_description:
In 2024, the risk of pre-installed certificate expiration of storage products is explosive. After the pre-installed certificate expires, alarms indicating that the storage certificate is about to expire or has expired will be reported, which may affect some functions and further affect upper-layer services. There are two certificate risks；
Complete risk mitigation before June 30, 2024 for contracts that will expire in 2024 and before December 30, 2024 for contracts that will expire in 2025 or 2026.
1，[CIT-P-202404]Warning of Expiration for Preset iBMC Certificates of Storage Product Servers；
2，[CIT-P-202410] Notice on Prewarning for Expiration Risk of Certificates in Storage Products；
Check risks based on the precaution and the information contained in the risk elimination solution package to ensure that all risks are eliminated.
2024年存储产品预置证书到期风险呈现爆发趋势，存储产品预置证书到期后，会上报存储证书即将过期、过期告警，可能影响部分功能，进而影响上层业务，此专项包含两个证书风险；
24年到期的在24年6月30日前完成风险消减，25&26年到期的在24年12月30日前完成风险消减：
1，【CIT-P-202404】关于存储产品服务器iBMC预置证书过期风险的预警通知；
2，【CIT-P-202410】关于存储产品证书过期风险的预警通知；
还请根据预警正文信息和风险消除方案包内内包含的各项信息进行风险排查，确保风险清零；

rows.title: 2024 Software Inventory SLB Product Certificate Risk Mitigation--2024年软件存量SLB产品证书风险消减专项
rows.precaution_title: 2024年软件公共部件证书风险消减专项
rows.creator: l84263029
rows.risk_description:
Note:
1. The SLB creates tasks for all software products on the entire network by country and customer network. During the check, you need to check all products (such as CBS/CRM/Mobile Money/NGBilling/IPCC/IPTrace/NGBSS/AAA/NGIN/RBT/SDP/VAS Cloud/5GMsg).
2. The certificate of installed base software SLB products expires in 2020. The reduction must be completed by December 31, 2024.
3. For details, see the A&S410-20240313-Notice on Preset Certificate Expiration Risks of SLB V300R001.
4. If the certificate expires, associate the risk work order with the task and submit the work order for review after the task is closed based on the task closure conditions.
5. If the certificate expiration is not involved, delete the IBMS device document and report that the certificate expiration is not involved. Then cancel the work order.

说明：
1.SLB是以国家&客户网络为单位给全网所有软件产品创建任务，排查时需要排查所有产品（CBS/CRM/Mobile Money/NGBilling/IPCC/IPTrace/NGBSS/AAA/NGIN/RBT/SDP/VAS Cloud/5GMsg等）
2.2025年软件存量SLB产品证书过期，要求100%完成消减，任务完成时间为2024年12月31日；
3.请参考《A&S410-20240313-关于SLB V300R001产品预置证书过期风险的预警通知》排查；
4.若涉及证书过期，在任务中关联风险作业单，根据任务闭环条件完成后提交评审；
5.若不涉及证书过期，请删除IBMS设备文档并反馈不涉及，取消任务单；

rows.title: 关于华为服务器产品预置SSL证书过期的风险通知
rows.precaution_title: 华为服务器预置证书过期风险预警
rows.creator: h84185509
rows.risk_description:
The preset SSL certificate of iBMC earlier than 253 (excluded) and iBMC 663 will expire on July 22, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of E9000 management module (MM910) firmware earlier than 690 (excluded) will expire on February 20, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of all versions of 9008 V5 (supporting CMC)/9032/9016/9008 server chassis management modules (KunLun CMC) will expire on February 20, 2024. After the software certificates expire, the WebUI and Redfish functions can be used properly. Some software or versions will report alarms.
iBMC 253(不包含)之前和663版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年7月22日过期；E9000管理板MM910固件版本690(不包含)之前版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年2月20日过期；9008 V5（Support CMC）/9032/9016/9008服务器机框管理板Kunlun CMC所有版本使用的预置SSL证书2024年2月20日过期。这些软件的证书过期后，web和redfish功能均可以正常使用，部分软件或版本会上报告警。如果客户网管开启了证书有效期校验，可能有脱管风险。

rows.product_names: iMaster NCE-FAN;iMaster NCE-T;Network Cloud Engine-T;Network Cloud Engine-FAN
rows.title: Risk Mitigation for the Expiration of the Preset Certificate for Arbitration Communication of NCE Products in 2026
rows.precaution_title: NCE产品仲裁通信预置证书2026年到期风险消减专项
rows.creator: l00568253
rows.risk_description:
The validity period of the preset certificate used by the arbitration software in NCE V100R019C00 is from 2016 to 2026. If DR is disabled when the certificate expires, a DR relationship with an arbitration site cannot be created. If DR is enabled, when the certificate expires, the automatic DR switchover capability is unavailable.

Follow the Precaution guide to clear the risk,
[Task closure requirement]:Upload evidence to task:
The version of NCE have been upgraded, or The certificate has been replaced.

rows.title: 2024 Optical Network Cross-Connection and System Control Boards Risk Clearance
rows.precaution_title: 2024光传送主控交叉隐患清理专项
rows.creator: l00332956
rows.risk_description:
Check and clear the 11 types of specified alarms on the system control board and cross-connect board.

[TOPN task device]: WDM products OptiX OSN 9800 series, OptiX OSN 8800 series, and OptiX OSN 1800 series

[Conditions for TOPN task Closure]:
Clear 11 types of alarm in DWDM network NESTATE_INSTALL, SYNC_FAIL, W_OFFLINE, NEBD_XC_DIF, TS_SYNC_FAIL, XCP_DEGRADE, KMC_ KEY_SYNC_FAIL, HARD_BAD, HARD_ERR, DBMS_ERROR, BUS_ERR

After alarm cleared, please export history alarm as guide document and upload to the task.

rows.creator: l00287791
rows.risk_description:
1. Check the number of Teleco Cloud software and hardware NEs involved at the network, and edit the Number of NEs for all products involved in this CPT task based on the network inventory(Products that can be added or deleted).
2. Create a NetCare Health Check Ticket, collect information about all involved software and hardware by referring to the Teleco Cloud In-depth Inspection Guide in the solution package, and escalate the Health Check Ticket to L2. After all information is collected, associate the Health Check Ticket number in the CPT task and feedback the completed number of NEs.
3. Confirm the risk report results provided after L2&L3 analysis. The final results are 100% recorded in the NetCare risk management system.
4. Close the task by referring to the solution package requirements.
Solution package link: https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/15132222

2.创建NetCare巡检单，参考方案包《电信云深度巡检指导书》对所有涉及软硬件进行信息收集，升级巡检单到L2。全部完成信息收集后即可在CPT任务中关联巡检单号并反馈完成网元数。

rows.title: 2024 Cloud Core Network Signaling Storm//2024年云核信令风暴专项
rows.precaution_title: 2024年云核信令风暴风险排查部署专项
rows.creator: l00287791
rows.risk_description:
1. Check the number of NEs (MSOFTX3000/UMG8900/SG7000/SPS/SBC/CSCF/ATS/USN/UGW/SMF/HSS9860/UDM/UPCC/UPCF) of all products at the network based on Cloud Core Network Signaling Storm Risk Check Guide. Edit the Number of NEs for all products involved in this CPT task based on the network inventory(Products that can be added or deleted)
2. Check whether all products have been deployed and optimized.
(1) Use the CIP to check the results of check items related to signaling storm configurations by referring to the Cloud Core Network Signaling Storm Risk Check Guide.
2. For the items that cannot be checked using the CIP tool, manually check the configuration by referring to the Cloud Core Network Signaling Storm Risk Check Guide.
3. If the solution is not deployed or the solution has been deployed but parameters need to be optimized, submit an RFC to complete deployment and optimization. Associate the RFC ticket number with the CPT task.
4. Close the task by referring to the solution package requirements.
Solution package link: https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/15132170

1.根据《云核心网信令风暴风险排查指导》核对局点所有产品的网元数（MSOFTX3000/UMG8900/SG7000/SPS/SBC/CSCF/ATS/USN/UGW/SMF/HSS9860/UDM/UPCC/UPCF），根据局点实际情况编辑本CPT任务中所有产品的“网元数”（可增删产品）。
2.排查所有产品是否已部署和优化。
1）使用CIP巡检，参考《云核心网信令风暴风险排查指导》检查涉及信令风暴配置的检查项结果。
2）无法通过CIP巡检工具检查项目，参考《云核心网信令风暴风险排查指导》手工进行配置检查。
3.如果未部署，或现网已部署但流控参数需要优化，则提交RFC完成部署和优化。请将RFC单号关联到此CPT任务中。
4.参考方案包要求，关闭任务。
方案包链接：https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/15132170

rows.title: Firewall risk identification and HA reliability assessment / 防火墙风险识别和双机可靠性评估专项行动
rows.precaution_title: 防火墙风险识别和双机可靠性评估专项行动
rows.creator: r00209145
rows.risk_description:
1. Create an inspection and analysis task on the NetCare platform to inspect the firewall. Enter the inspection order number (HCXXXXXXXXXXX) in the task order. If the IP Toolkit cannot be used to collect firewall data due to customer or network reasons, you can manually collect data by referring to the link in the solution package 'The datacom inspection and analysis platform supports manual information collection'.
2. In the active/standby firewall two-node cluster scenario, use the method described in 'Firewall_Identify the differences between two-node cluster devices' in the solution package to check the active/standby reliability. In this task, upload the check result and the corresponding project name in the UMC.
3. Record identified risks in the NetCare system based on the inspection results and active/standby two-node cluster check results, and create risk tickets to track and close the risks,

Remarks:
1. For details about how to manually collect information, see 'The datacom inspection and analysis platform supports manual information collection'. For details about how to check the reliability of the active/standby two-node cluster, see 'Firewall_Identify the differences between two-node cluster devices'.
2. If any problem occurs during the inspection or analysis, submit a trouble ticket to the GTAC, or contact chenyunlei 00538156 or renshiqi 00549633 for assistance.
3. After the risk of checking the active/standby two-node cluster is eliminated, communicate with the customer and obtain the customer's approval. Then, submit an RFC(NC2023XXXXXXXXXXX) for active/standby switchover test.


1、在NetCare平台上创建巡检分析任务，对防火墙进行巡检。在本任务单中填写巡检单号（HCXXXXXXXXXX）。如果因为客户或网络原因，无法使用IP Toolkit对防火墙进行数据采集，可参考方案包“数通巡检分析平台支持手工采集信息”中链接，使用手工方法采集。
2、防火墙主备双机场景，使用方案包”防火墙_主备双机差异识别“中方法，进行主备可靠性核查。在本任务单中，上传核查结果和对应UMC中的项目名称。
3、基于巡检和主备双机核查的巡检结果，将识别的风险录入NetCare系统，创建风险单跟踪闭环。，

备注：
1、 手工采集方法，请参考“ 数通巡检分析平台支持手工采集信息” ；主备双机可靠性排查，请参考”防火墙_主备双机差异识别“。
2、 巡检或分析中如有问题，请提单到GTAC，或者联系chenyunlei 00538156 或 renshiqi 00549633协助解决。
3、 主备双机排查的风险消除后，与客户沟通后取得同意，可提交变更单(NC2023XXXXXXXXXXX) 进行主备倒换测试。

rows.title: 电信云数据第三方备份/Telecom Cloud Data Third-Party Backup
rows.precaution_title: 电信云数据第三方备份
rows.creator: y00543860
rows.risk_description:
多国多运营商陆续出现CloudOS故障，网元虚拟机故障或者丢失，所有上层业务受损或完全中断，由于局点未进行I层数据的第三方备份，业务受损时间长、甚至只能重新部署，局点业务恢复时间不可控。
23年作为TOPN专项任务与各区域CS业务主管，高督做专题沟通。通过NETCARE的风险运营中心按照涉及客户群下发任务到各代表处并进行进展跟踪，专项执行过程中问题通过ITR流程支持，本次要求电信云C面全部实现第三方数据备份。
跟踪闭环措施:
1.电信云第三方备份专项任务关闭必须关联RFC单。
2.将FS、FSOM和Fusionstage数据备份成功任务截图上传TOPN任务，任务可闭环，如果有多个DC，可以将截图按DC站点名字区分，一起上传。
3.如果客户不批准第三方备份，上传客户不同意邮件
Cloud OS faults occur in multiple countries and carriers. The VM of NE is faulty or lost, all upper-layer services are damaged or completely interrupted. As the third-party data backup at the IaaS layer is not performed at the site, the service interruption time is long or even the site needs to be redeployed. The service restoration time is uncontrollable.
Communicated with regional CS business directors and senior supervisors as a special task for TOPN in 2023. The NetCare assigns tasks to rep offices based on the customer groups involved and tracks the progress, the TOP N must be resolved through the ITR process，all C plane of Telcom Cloud must finish third-party data backup,
Tracking and closed-loop measures:
1. The third-party backup task of the telecom cloud must be associated with RFC ticket.
2.Upload the screenshots of successful data backup tasks of FusionSphere, FusionSphere OM, and FusionStage to the top N tasks. The tasks can be closed. If there are multiple DCs, the screenshots can be separated by DC site name and uploaded together.
3.If customer don’t approve the third-party backup, upload customer email

rows.creator: l00203087
rows.cancel_reason: NE9000 is not involved in our network
rows.risk_description:
1. Create an inspection analysis task on the NetCare platform to inspect routing loop risks. Enter the inspection order number (HCXXXXXX) in the task order.
2. Record the identified risks in the NetCare system based on the inspection results, and create risk tickets to track and close the risks.
3. Update the emergency plan and check whether the remote access mode is available and whether the active and standby planes are planned correctly.
Remarks:
1. The loop risk check involves all datacom products. For details about the preventive maintenance analysis method, see the Special Solution for Preventing Loop Risks in Datacom Networks in 2023.
2. If any problem occurs during the preventive maintenance inspection or analysis, submit a trouble ticket to the GTAC. Contact the product contact person in the R&D department, or contact Liu Xiaoyi 00538686 or rushuhua00442581 for assistance.
3. If the NE9000 active/standby plane check and IPsec site risk identification are involved, contact R&D engineers for further confirmation. R&D contact: Yang Maosheng 00347642 (NE9000) and Tian Zhekai 00450063 (IPSEC)

rows.title: Risk check if SSDs are running more than 4 years and their erase/write life will expires in batches // 发货超四年SSD盘，擦写寿命批量到期的风险排查
rows.precaution_title: 发货超四年SSD盘，擦写寿命批量到期的风险排查
rows.creator: z84270602
rows.risk_description:
SSD盘为耗材，存在擦写寿命达集中到期的风险，导致需要批量集中更换，而在当地无足够的备件进行更换的情况下，存在业务中断的风险，目前全球已发生多起。所以，需要发货超过4年的SSD盘进行风险排查，如满足排查条件，提前储备备件或更换。

SSDs are consumables and may be replaced in batches due to the expiration of their erasure/write lifespan. However, services may be interrupted if local spare parts are insufficient for replacement. Currently, there are many projects that are nearing the end of their lifespan in batches around the world. Therefore, SSDs that have been delivered for more than four years need to be checked for risks. If the check conditions are met, reserve spare parts or replace them in advance.

rows.title: 2023 Risks in the access network equipment room environment
rows.precaution_title: 2023 接入网机房环境风险
rows.creator: l00208242
rows.risk_description:
[Risk Description]
Equipment running environment risks are major risks of access network products. Most of the MA5600T series have been running for a long time and are aging. The service life of the MA5600T series is close to the end. Failure rate is increasing due to environmental factors. (such as ash accumulation, vulcanization, etc.) Major problems, such as board startup failure and active/standby switchover failure, occur frequently on the live network, which severely affects network security


[Disposal Suggestion]
( http://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/13747841 )
1. Download the latest version uFad-AN (SingleTOOLs uFAD-AN V100R002C10SPC236 or later version)
https://support.huawei.com/carrier/navi?coltype=software#col=software&path=PBI1-252301455/PBI1-252303293/PBI1-8132361/PBI1-22056712
Do not apply for the uFAD-T inspection tool for transmission by mistake.
2. Refer to 《2023 TOPN 15. Risks in the access network equipment room environment (Operation Guide)》, use “Special Inspection Template for Dust Accumulation” inspection template to analyze MA5600T series equipment on the live network.
3. After the inspection report (OLT Engineer Report) is generated, contact the HQ GTS and R&D contact persons. Based on the inspection results, R&D engineers is going to identify risky sites and sort the sites by risk level. (Contact Person: luohaoxin 00543984）
4. The L1 develops the next-step risk management plan based on the site risk identification result.
5. Onsite verification (optional) Based on site risk ranking, visit top risk sites as required. You can follow checking guidelines (《Checklist for the Equipment Room Environment on the Live Network》) to check the equipment room environment. And prepare for potential customer interface communication.

rows.title: Risk of Digital Certificate Expiration
rows.creator: f00199581
rows.risk_description:
【NE involved】
All BSC6900/6910 controller & All 2/3/4/5 G sites

[Problem Description]
A preconfigured certificate is issued by the vendor's CA and is used only to establish an initial secure channel for devices to access the customer network during deployment. According to 3GPP TS 33.310, the certificate preconfigured by the vendor must be replaced with the operator certificate before commercial use. Currently, a large number of devices on the carrier's network still use Huawei pre-configured certificates. In October 2024, the preconfigured certificates of nearly 3000 base station controllers will expire. After the certificates expire, the OMCH between the base station controllers and the U2000 will be disconnected.

【Solution】
1: Deploy operator-own CA
2. Deploy MAE LiteCA

【Guide】：http://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/13748395?l=zh-cn&moduleId=732999204558016512&ctype=-1

【Risk mitigation and confirmation】
(1) Collect all wireless NE data for HQ/Romania GTAC to analyze certificate risk.
(2) Complete risk mitigation based on the customer's mitigation solution and plan (refer to the task/risk closure conditions), in the guide.
(3) Frontline engineers collect controller data on live network again and HQ analyzes the data and confirms that the controller certificate has been replaced.

rows.title: Reliability Assurance for Hardware-FDD
rows.creator: f00199581
rows.risk_description:
【NE involved】
Modules that are delivered in batches and have been put into commercial use for one to two years.
【Risk description】
Background: Under the background of supply continuity, a large number of components of FDD hardware modules have been switched since 2021, and a large number of matching software has been updated accordingly. In 2022, hardware module problems such as RRU5505 phase-locked loop, RRU5502 time sequence, and power terminal carbonization occurred. According to the problem rules, these problems are caused by the problems on the live network that have been exposed during the batch commercial use of new hardware for more than one year, and affecting the customer network a lot.

【Action】
1. Proactively check risks of new hardware modules, identify potential risks, high temperature/humidity, and power supply environment exceptions, and analyze and rectify faulty modules in advance.
2. Start and check the modules with carbonization risks of high-power power terminals, proactively identify potential sites, and clear the sites.
---Collect following logs and send them to the R&D department for analysis. The R&D department will provide an analysis report.(R&D: Jia Dewei 00496141, Li Xiaogang 00335477)
1. CFLTLOG（NE Fault Log）
2. Inventory information
3. Configuration
4. Alarm
5.DSP info
（DSP FAN:;
DSP BRDTEMP:;
DSP GPSSNR:;
DSP CPRILBR:;
DSP CLKDA: SN=7;
DSP CLKDA: SN=6;
DSP SFP:;）

REFER TO ATTACHMENT FOR DETAILS

Contact person:
R&D: Jia Dewei 00496141, Li Xiaogang 00335477
Services: Wang Weiwei 00408553, Ma Chunlei 00330741

rows.title: ALM-26200 Board Hardware Fault is reported when the UBBPg1a/UBBPg2running at a high temperature，services on the board are unavailable
rows.precaution_title: UBBPg1a/g2基带板长时间运行在高温条件下概率性上报ALM-26200 单板硬件故障告警，导致业务中断
rows.creator: z00600767
rows.risk_description:
根据故障排查指导书收集数据，反馈给研发接口人戴旭光（00447671）分析确认是否存在风险：
排查方法（http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_18491985.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file&ctype=-1）：
1、确认基带板类型是否为UBBPg1a/g2
2、获取全网BBU运行温度数据（涉及MML:DSP FAN:; DSP BRDTEMP:;）
3、获取全网UBBPg1a和UBBPg2单板存量文件（板+框）
4、获取全网中心层故障日志。

备注：数据收集操作指导：http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_18492333.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file&ctype=-1


Collect data according to the troubleshooting guide and send the data to the R&D contact person Dai Xuguang (00447671) for analysis and confirmation.
Troubleshooting method (http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_18491985.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file&ctype=-1):
1. Check whether the BBP is a UBBPg1a or UBBPg2.
2. Run the DSP FAN command and DSP BRDTEMP command to obtain the BBU operating temperature data on the entire network.
3. Obtain the inventory files of the UBBPg1a and UBBPg2 boards on the entire network (board+subrack).
4. Obtain fault logs at the central layer on the entire network.

Remarks: Data collection guide: http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_18492333.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file&ctype=-1

rows.creator: w00301388
rows.risk_description:
1．If you are not the handler and owner of this task, please kindly transfer it to the correct wireless person.

rows.title: VOLTE 容灾应急倒换和逃生方案风险 Risks of VoLTE Emergency Switchover and Emergency escape
rows.precaution_title: VOLTE 容灾应急倒换和逃生方案风险
rows.creator: c00203075
rows.risk_description:
[Disposal Method]:
1. Customer communication: Transfer VOLTE stable operation requirements and jointly manage risks with customers (Minutes of regular meetings or topical communication, and emails).
2. Inspection: Perform network inspection twice in 2022 and use the CIP to perform configuration and pre-warning check. (Creating Inspection and Pre-warning Tasks on the CIP Platform)
Check key VoLTE parameters and evaluate capacity based on service growth.
3. Contingency plan: Update emergency plans. If the scenario-based contingency plan library is used, scenario-based contingency plans must be included.
4. Drill: Conduct at least one emergency drill before the end of 2022.
Option 1: Onsite DR drill, complete DR drill with service equivalent users at least 500,000 before December.
Option 2: In the lab, if the customer does not agree to the live-network drill, complete the drill in the lab before December.
Option 3: If the condition1&2 are not met, submit the risk acceptance to customer.

rows.title: Power terminal carbonation risk clearance
rows.precaution_title: Power terminal carbonation risk clearance
rows.creator: z00621356
rows.cancel_reason: already data collected and no risks are reported to me
rows.risk_description:
check whether below risk existing in current network or not. if yes, record risk in system to follow up

[Problem Scenario]:Power terminals are carbonized and burnt at multiple sites in high-temperature countries.
[Fault Symptom]:In high-temperature areas, the power terminals of high-power modules are carbonized and burnt.
[Trigger Condition]:1. The stripped length of the power cable is insufficient.The contact resistance becomes large after the insulation layer is pressed. As a result, the power cable is overheated and burnt. 2. The power cable at the ground clip is not well-made and has no shield layer. The insulation of the cable is damaged and short-circuited with the ground clip.

[Check Method]:
1. For sites earlier than SRAN17.1SPC180, extract central-layer fault logs(section 2.4 in the guide) and inventory files(section 2.2 in the guide).
2. In SRAN17.1SPC180 and later versions, the resistance detection solution is incorporated to identify risky sites based on power supply alarm monitoring. RFTEST logs(section 2.6 in the guide) and inventory files(section 2.2 in the guide) need to be extracted to accurately identify high-risk sites.
3、Send the collected inventory files and central-layer fault logs/RFTEST logs to Zhou Cai 0051065 for data analysis.
Refer to the below link for details,
http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_17561981.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file
If you have any questions, contact Ma Chunlei (00330741) and Zhang Tianbo (00621356).

rows.work_notes: HC on progress
rows.title: Datacom Maintenance Risk Elimination for Small Networks 3.0
rows.precaution_title: Datacom Maintenance Risk Elimination for Small Networks 3.0
rows.creator: c00376477
rows.risk_description:
Small networks outside China have not been inspected for a long time, leading to risks such as version EOS, non-standard configuration, no network protection, and insufficient capacity. In 2022, start the small-network risk elimination project. The datacom maintenance team of the representative office completes network preventive maintenance inspection, identifies network risks, and implements risk elimination actions. The specific tasks are as follows:
1. Create an inspection analysis task on the NetCare platform to inspect datacom devices (including routers, switches, and firewalls). Enter the inspection order number (HCXXXXXX) in this work order.
2. Record the identified risks in the NetCare system based on the inspection results, and create a risk ticket to track and close the risks.
3. Update the emergency plan, check whether the remote access mode is available, and check whether active/standby plane protection is available for core services.
If you have any questions about the risks identified during the inspection and the risk handling suggestions, contact Chen Zongrong (employee ID: 00376477).
If you need help during risk closure, submit a trouble ticket to the GTAC or contact Cuitao (employee ID: 00364480).
If the customer does not agree or thinks that the inspection is not required, upload the information confirmed with the customer when closing the work order.
海外小国小网存在长期未巡检，存在版本EOS，配置不规范，组网无保护，容量不足等风险。2022年启动小网小网风险清零专项，由代表处数通维护团队完成网络巡检，识别网络风险，实施风险清除行动。具体任务如下：
1、在NetCare平台上创建巡检分析任务，对数通设备（包含路由器、交换机、防火墙）进行巡检。并在本任务单中填写巡检单号（HCXXXXXX）。
2、基于巡检结果，将识别的风险录入NetCare系统，创建风险单跟踪闭环。
3、刷新应急预案，检查远程接入方式是否可用，检查核心业务是否有主备平面保护。
如果对巡检识别的风险和风险处理建议有疑问，请联系chenzongrong 00376477协调支撑。
如果风险闭环中遇到问题需帮助，请提单到GTAC或联系cuitao 00364480协助解决
如果客户不同意或认为无风险不需巡检，请在关闭任务单时，上传与客户确认的信息。

rows.title: Risk Investigation of Service Disruption Triggered by Unsupported IPv6 Packets Received by Routers in Specific Scenarios 关于路由器在特定场景下收到不支持的IPv6报文触发业务受损风险排查
rows.precaution_title: 关于路由器在特定场景下收到不支持的IPv6报文触发业务受损风险排查
rows.creator: l00203087
rows.risk_description:
[Disposal Method] :
1. Investigate whether the current network involves MPAC data configuration.
Investigation Plan 1 (Recommended): Use inspection tools to investigate, refer to "IPv6 Early Warning Collection and Analysis Guide (IP Toolkit + UMC)".
Investigation Plan 2 (Manual):
1.2.1) Execute the display version command under the user view to check if the device has any issues. The following versions are involved:
1.2.1.1) ATN&NE40E&CX600&ME60&NE8000&NE9000&NE20E&PTN6900&NetEngine A800: All versions of V800
1.2.1.2) ATN: All versions of V300
1.2.2) Execute display current-configuration under the user view to check for service-security policy ipv6 configuration. If present, there is a risk.
<HUAWEI>display current-configuration | include service-security
service-security policy ipv6 test1 //test1 is an example configuration name for MPAC IPv6 policy
2. If the current network devices have MPAC data configuration, provide feedback on the number of involved devices in the task progress, and track until the risk reduction is completed, then close the investigation task.
Risk reduction closure standard: Execute the preventive measures in the early warning or complete the upgrade of the current network devices according to the rectification requirements (rectification plan released online on August 10).
3. If the current network devices are not configured with MPAC, it is not involved. Provide feedback that it is not involved, and the investigation task can be directly closed.
If there are any questions during the risk investigation process, please contact the R&D interface person Wu Haimin at 00483639.

【处置方法】：
1、    排查现网是否涉及MPAC数据配置，
排查方案1（推荐）：通过巡检工具排查，参考《IPv6预警的采集和分析指导 (IP Toolkit + UMC)》
排查方案2（手工）：
             1.2.1）在用户视图下执行display version命令，查看设备是否存在问题。下列版本涉及：
                       1.2.1.1） ATN&NE40E&CX600&ME60&NE8000&NE9000&NE20E&PTN6900&NetEngine A800:V800所有版本
                       1.2.1.2）ATN:V300所有版本
            1.2.2) 在用户视图执行display current-configuration，查看有service-security policy ipv6配置，有则存在风险。
                  <HUAWEI>display current-configuration | include service-security 
                    service-security policy ipv6 test1  //test1是举例配置MPAC IPv6策略名
2、如果现网设备有MPAC数据配置，在任务进展中反馈涉及设备数量，并跟踪到风险消减完成，再闭环排查任务。
风险消减闭环标准：执行完成预警中的预防措施或者根据整改要求完成现网设备升级（整改计划8月10日发布上网）。
3、  如果现网设备未配置MPAC，则不涉及，反馈不涉及，排查任务可以直接闭环。 

如果在风险排查过程中有任何疑问，请联系研发接口人吴海民 00483639

rows.title: 2025 Risk of Wireless Digital Certificate Expiration-OSS(MAE，U2000)
rows.precaution_title: 2025无线数字证书到期风险-网管（MAE，U2000）
rows.creator: f00199581
rows.risk_description:
【Problem Description】
The earliest expiration date for the OSS certificates is March 9, 2027. Certificate expiration will cause interconnection failures between NEs and the OSS, northbound systems and the OSS, or OSS subsystems. If the FusionSphere OpenStack certificates expire, the FusionSphere OpenStack web client and the FusionSphere OpenStack Management Console cannot be accessed, and FusionSphere OpenStack services are abnormal. In this case, the VMs keep running, but their lifecycle management operations become unavailable.
【Task Handling】
1. check involved NE amount according to product precaution, update the "involved NE" of this CPT task.
2. Link network change ticket to this task, update progress, close the task after replace certificate.

rows.work_notes:
1.	The contingency plan is done with ID is TC20250209100001 with a sub-task (ST20250209100002).
2.	The survive drill is done with drill ticket (AD20250406100002).

3. Close the assurance task after the contingency plan and drill task are completed. For details about the contingency plan template, MOP template, and lab drill scenario ID, please refer to https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/18310545?moduleId=732999204558016512

rows.work_notes: rectification is completed,The NEs have been rectified and the IBMS has been updated
rows.title: Datacom Frame-shaped Device Rectification Clearance/数通框式整改风险清理
rows.precaution_title: 数通框式整改风险清理
rows.creator: z00211079
rows.risk_description:
Background: Major faults occur on the live network caused by multiple known problems due to factors such as inaccurate IBMS data and missing rectification implementation. To eliminate risks that need to be rectified, this project is developed

Special Solution: Sort out the rectifications released in Datacom domain in the past three years, to match IBMS inventory, UMC risks and RFC, identify the list of suspected sites that have not been rectified, and track and clear the sites through this special maintenance tasks

Closure Condition:

For NEs that have been rectified on the live network:
1. If the NE information is consistent with that in the IBMS, can close the CPT task directly. Remark as "The NEs have been rectified and the IBMS has been updated". The closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the current IB information in the CPT task

2. If the NE information is inconsistent with that in the IBMS, the IBMS needs to be updated. The closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the updated IB information in the CPT task

For NEs that have not been rectified on the live network:
1. If the customer agree to implement the rectification, complete the rectification in 2025 and update the IBMS.
(1) If Huawei implements the rectification with RCxxx ticket, the closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload the updated IB information screenshot in the CPT task

(2) If Huawei implements the rectification without RCxxx ticket, the closure condition is to associate the RFC ticket in the CPT task and upload the updated IB information screenshot in the CPT task

(3) If customer implements the rectification, the closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the updated IB information in the CPT task

2. If the customer does not agree to the rectification, obtain effective record filing documents and associate the RCxxx ticket. The closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload effective record filing documents in the CPT task

3.If the rectification is delayed to 2026, create RCxxx ticket，obtain effective record filing documents and associate the RCxxx ticket. The closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload effective record filing documents in the CPT task，the rectification will be managed as a routine delay at 2026

For NEs that have been offline from the live network: Can close the CPT task directly. Remark as "The NEs have been already offline" and delete the corresponding IBMS inventory information. There is no closure condition


If you have any questions about inspection and risk clearance, contact Zhang Lei (employee ID: 00556734)




专项背景：因IBMS数据不准、整改实施遗漏等因素，导致现网发生多起已知问题引发的现网重大故障，为清理整改应做未做的风险，特开展本专项

专项方案：梳理数通近三年发布的整改，多维度匹配IBMS存量/巡检风险/Netcare变更单，识别出“疑似”未整改局点清单，并通过“专项维护任务”跟踪清理

闭环条件：

对于在网且现网已整改的网元：
1.如果网元信息和IBMS一致，直接闭环，闭环时备注“已整改，且IBMS已刷新”，闭环条件是在CPT风险流程上传当前IB信息截图

2.如果网元信息和IBMS不一致，需要刷新IBMS，闭环条件是在CPT风险流程上传刷新后IB信息截图

对于在网的现网未整改的网元：
1.如果客户决策实施，需要于25年正常完成整改，并刷新IBMS：
(1)如果华为实施，需要整改单：闭环条件是在CPT风险流程关联整改单（整改单里面关联RFC闭环），并在CPT风险流程中上传IB信息截图

(2)如果华为实施，不需要整改单：闭环条件是在CPT风险流程直接关联RFC单，并在CPT风险流程中上传IB信息截图

(3)如果客户实施：闭环条件是在CPT风险流程上传IB信息截图

2.如果客户决策不实施，需要获取有效的备案文件，并关联整改单。闭环条件是在CPT风险流程关联整改单，并在CPT风险流程中上传有效的备案文件

3.如果延期到2026年整改，需要获取有效的备案文件，并关联整改单。闭环条件是在CPT风险流程关联整改单，并在CPT风险流程中上传有效的备案文件，26年作为例行延期整改管理

对于已下线的网元：直接闭环，备注“已下线”，并刷新IBMS存量信息。无闭环条件


如果您对巡检排查和风险清理有疑问，请联系张雷 00556734
