rows.title: Storage Product Certificate Expiration Risk Mitigation Project in 2024- 2024年存储产品证书到期风险消减专项
rows.precaution_title: 2024年存储产品证书到期风险消减专项
rows.creator: h84185509
rows.risk_description:
In 2024, the risk of pre-installed certificate expiration of storage products is explosive. After the pre-installed certificate expires, alarms indicating that the storage certificate is about to expire or has expired will be reported, which may affect some functions and further affect upper-layer services. There are two certificate risks；
Complete risk mitigation before June 30, 2024 for contracts that will expire in 2024 and before December 30, 2024 for contracts that will expire in 2025 or 2026.
1，[CIT-P-202404]Warning of Expiration for Preset iBMC Certificates of Storage Product Servers；
2，[CIT-P-202410] Notice on Prewarning for Expiration Risk of Certificates in Storage Products；
Check risks based on the precaution and the information contained in the risk elimination solution package to ensure that all risks are eliminated.
2024年存储产品预置证书到期风险呈现爆发趋势，存储产品预置证书到期后，会上报存储证书即将过期、过期告警，可能影响部分功能，进而影响上层业务，此专项包含两个证书风险；
24年到期的在24年6月30日前完成风险消减，25&26年到期的在24年12月30日前完成风险消减：
1，【CIT-P-202404】关于存储产品服务器iBMC预置证书过期风险的预警通知；
2，【CIT-P-202410】关于存储产品证书过期风险的预警通知；
还请根据预警正文信息和风险消除方案包内内包含的各项信息进行风险排查，确保风险清零；

rows.title: 2024 Software I2000 Product Certificate Risk Mitigation Special/2024年软件I2000产品证书风险消减专项
rows.precaution_title: 2024年软件公共部件证书风险消减专项
rows.creator: l84263029
rows.risk_description:
Pease check Check all I2000 products on the local network
1. Certificates of products earlier than iManager I2000 V500R003/V500R002/V500R001/V300R001 have been running on the live network for more than 10 years. Certificates may expire.
2. For details, see the A&S413-20240330-Warning on the Issue that the Non-Initial Certificate of the iManager I2000 Is About to Expire.
3. If the certificate expires, associate the risk work order with the task and submit the work order for review after the task is closed based on the task closure conditions.
4. If certificate expiration is not involved, change the number of involved NEs to 0 based on the site requirements.
检查本网络所有I2000产品
1.iManager I2000 V500R003/V500R002/V500R001/V300R001版本以下产品证书在网持续运行满10年，证书有过期风险；
2.请参考《A&S413-20240330-关于iManager I2000产品非初始证书即将到期问题预警》排查；
3.经排查若涉及证书过期，在任务中关联风险作业单，根据任务闭环条件完成后提交评审；
4.经排查若不涉及证书过期，按一线实际情况编辑涉及产品网元数为0

rows.title: 2024 Survival Drill Task / 2024年逃生预案演练任务
rows.creator: l00287791
rows.risk_description:
Based on the survive drill test in 2024, the front line needs to develop a online contingency plan and perform the drill test.
1.The contingency plan：Develop a contingency plan online. After a contingency plan is created, associate with a sub-task (STxxx).
2.The survive drill: It is recommended that the drill be performed on the live network. After the drill is complete, associate it with an RFC ticket (NCxxx) or drill a ticket (ADxxx).
3.Close the assurance task after the contingency plan and drill task are completed. For details about the contingency plan template, MOP template, and lab drill scenario ID, please refer to
https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/15205704?l=zh-cn&moduleId=732999204558016512.

基于2024年逃生预案演练任务，需要一线制作应急预案并进行演练。
1. 应急预案：使用在线方式制作应急预案，预案制作完成后关联子任务单号（ST单）；
2. 逃生演练：演练建议在现网/实验室进行，演练完成后请关联变更单号（NC单）或者演练单号（AD单）；
3. 预案和演练任务全部完成后即可关闭维护任务。预案模板、MOP模板和实验室演练场景ID等方案包请参考
https://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/15205704?l=zh-cn&moduleId=732999204558016512

rows.title: Risk warning of Expiration of Preset Certificates on Huawei Servers-华为服务器预置证书过期风险预警
rows.precaution_title: 华为服务器预置证书过期风险预警
rows.creator: h84185509
rows.risk_description:
The preset SSL certificate of iBMC earlier than 253 (excluded) and iBMC 663 will expire on July 22, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of E9000 management module (MM910) firmware earlier than 690 (excluded) will expire on February 20, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of all versions of 9008 V5 (supporting CMC)/9032/9016/9008 server chassis management modules (KunLun CMC) will expire on February 20, 2024. After the software certificates expire, the WebUI and Redfish functions can be used properly. Some software or versions will report alarms.
If certificate validity period verification is enabled on the customer's network management system (NMS), the device may be out of management.
iBMC 253(不包含)之前和663版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年7月22日过期；E9000管理板MM910固件版本690(不包含)之前版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年2月20日过期；9008 V5（Support CMC）/9032/9016/9008服务器机框管理板Kunlun CMC所有版本使用的预置SSL证书2024年2月20日过期。这些软件的证书过期后，web和redfish功能均可以正常使用，部分软件或版本会上报告警。如果客户网管开启了证书有效期校验，可能有脱管风险。

rows.title: 2024 Software Service FusionSphere Product Certificate Risk Mitigation Special-2024年软件业务FusionSphere产品证书风险消减专项

rows.risk_description:

1. The FusionSphere creates tasks for all software products on the entire network by country and customer network. During the check, you need to check all products (such as CBS/Mobile Money/AAA/VDS/BES/CRM/IPCC & CSP/AICC/EVC/IPTrace).
2. The certificate of installed base software FusionSphere products expires in 2020. The reduction must be completed by December 31, 2024.

The preset SSL certificate of iBMC earlier than 253 (excluded) and iBMC 663 will expire on July 22, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of E9000 management module (MM910) firmware earlier than 690 (excluded) will expire on February 20, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of all versions of 9008 V5 (supporting CMC)/9032/9016/9008 server chassis management modules (KunLun CMC) will expire on February 20, 2024. After the software certificates expire, the WebUI and Redfish functions can be used properly. Some software or versions will report alarms.
iBMC 253(不包含)之前和663版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年7月22日过期；E9000管理板MM910固件版本690(不包含)之前版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年2月20日过期；9008 V5（Support CMC）/9032/9016/9008服务器机框管理板Kunlun CMC所有版本使用的预置SSL证书2024年2月20日过期。这些软件的证书过期后，web和redfish功能均可以正常使用，部分软件或版本会上报告警。如果客户网管开启了证书有效期校验，可能有脱管风险。

rows.title: 电信云数据第三方备份/Telecom Cloud Data Third-Party Backup
rows.precaution_title: 电信云数据第三方备份
rows.creator: y00543860
rows.risk_description:
多国多运营商陆续出现CloudOS故障，网元虚拟机故障或者丢失，所有上层业务受损或完全中断，由于局点未进行I层数据的第三方备份，业务受损时间长、甚至只能重新部署，局点业务恢复时间不可控。
23年作为TOPN专项任务与各区域CS业务主管，高督做专题沟通。通过NETCARE的风险运营中心按照涉及客户群下发任务到各代表处并进行进展跟踪，专项执行过程中问题通过ITR流程支持，本次要求电信云C面全部实现第三方数据备份。
跟踪闭环措施:
1.电信云第三方备份专项任务关闭必须关联RFC单。
2.将FS、FSOM和Fusionstage数据备份成功任务截图上传TOPN任务，任务可闭环，如果有多个DC，可以将截图按DC站点名字区分，一起上传。
3.如果客户不批准第三方备份，上传客户不同意邮件
Cloud OS faults occur in multiple countries and carriers. The VM of NE is faulty or lost, all upper-layer services are damaged or completely interrupted. As the third-party data backup at the IaaS layer is not performed at the site, the service interruption time is long or even the site needs to be redeployed. The service restoration time is uncontrollable.
Communicated with regional CS business directors and senior supervisors as a special task for TOPN in 2023. The NetCare assigns tasks to rep offices based on the customer groups involved and tracks the progress, the TOP N must be resolved through the ITR process，all C plane of Telcom Cloud must finish third-party data backup,
Tracking and closed-loop measures:
1. The third-party backup task of the telecom cloud must be associated with RFC ticket.
2.Upload the screenshots of successful data backup tasks of FusionSphere, FusionSphere OM, and FusionStage to the top N tasks. The tasks can be closed. If there are multiple DCs, the screenshots can be separated by DC site name and uploaded together.
3.If customer don’t approve the third-party backup, upload customer email

rows.title: 2023 Datacom Anti-Flap Loop Risk Special //2023年数通防震荡环路风险专项
rows.precaution_title: 2023年数通防震荡环路风险专项
rows.creator: l00203087
rows.risk_description:
1. Create an inspection analysis task on the NetCare platform to inspect routing loop risks. Enter the inspection order number (HCXXXXXX) in the task order.
2. Record the identified risks in the NetCare system based on the inspection results, and create risk tickets to track and close the risks.
3. Update the emergency plan and check whether the remote access mode is available and whether the active and standby planes are planned correctly.
Remarks:
1. The loop risk check involves all datacom products. For details about the preventive maintenance analysis method, see the Special Solution for Preventing Loop Risks in Datacom Networks in 2023.
2. If any problem occurs during the preventive maintenance inspection or analysis, submit a trouble ticket to the GTAC. Contact the product contact person in the R&D department, or contact Liu Xiaoyi 00538686 or rushuhua00442581 for assistance.
3. If the NE9000 active/standby plane check and IPsec site risk identification are involved, contact R&D engineers for further confirmation. R&D contact: Yang Maosheng 00347642 (NE9000) and Tian Zhekai 00450063 (IPSEC)

#If the customer does not agree or considers that there is no risk, upload the information confirmed with the customer when closing the work order.


1、在NetCare平台上创建巡检分析任务，对路由环路风险进行巡检。在本任务单中填写巡检单号（HCXXXXXX）。
2、基于巡检结果，将识别的风险录入NetCare系统，创建风险单跟踪闭环。
3、刷新应急预案，检查远程接入方式是否可用，主备平面规划是否正确。
备注：
1、 环路风险检查涉及全部数通产品，巡检分析方法请参考“ 2023年数通防震荡环路风险专项方案”
2、 巡检或分析中如有问题，请提单到GTAC，或联系研发对应产品接口人，或者联系liuxiaoyi 00538686 、rushuhua00442581协助解决。
3、涉及NE9000主备平面检查、IPsec 局点风险识别，需要联系研发二次确认，研发接口人阳茂盛 00347642（NE9000）、 田哲凯 00450063（IPSEC）

如果客户不同意或认为无风险不需巡检，请在关闭任务单时，上传与客户确认的信息。

rows.title: Risk of Digital Certificate Expiration
rows.creator: f00199581
rows.risk_description:
【NE involved】
All BSC6900/6910 controller & All 2/3/4/5 G sites

[Problem Description]
A preconfigured certificate is issued by the vendor's CA and is used only to establish an initial secure channel for devices to access the customer network during deployment. According to 3GPP TS 33.310, the certificate preconfigured by the vendor must be replaced with the operator certificate before commercial use. Currently, a large number of devices on the carrier's network still use Huawei pre-configured certificates. In October 2024, the preconfigured certificates of nearly 3000 base station controllers will expire. After the certificates expire, the OMCH between the base station controllers and the U2000 will be disconnected.

【Solution】
1: Deploy operator-own CA
2. Deploy MAE LiteCA

【Guide】：http://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/13748395?l=zh-cn&moduleId=732999204558016512&ctype=-1

【Risk mitigation and confirmation】
(1) Collect all wireless NE data for HQ/Romania GTAC to analyze certificate risk.
(2) Complete risk mitigation based on the customer's mitigation solution and plan (refer to the task/risk closure conditions), in the guide.
(3) Frontline engineers collect controller data on live network again and HQ analyzes the data and confirms that the controller certificate has been replaced.

rows.title: Reliability assurance of new microwave hardware
rows.creator: f00199581
rows.risk_description:
【NE involved】
SCC boards: RTN 320F(SLG2DMD4D VER.C), RTN 380AX-DC(SLE3MXXI4 VER.D), RTN 905 2F(SLD4IRU2 VER.G), RTN 910AF(SLJ1CSHRF VER.D), RTN 950AF(SLF3CSHOF VER.B), RTN 950UF(SL95CSHUF VER.C).
Service boards: ISM8 (SL91ISM8 VER.F), ML1D(SL91ML1D VER.D), EM6X(SL93EM6X VER.D).

【Issue description】
A large number of new hardware is put into commercial use. The new microwave hardware carries a large number of services and has high accident risks.

【Solution】
Perform preventive maintenance on the new hardware of the preceding boards.
WMG/NCE/uFAD inspection platform: The service inspection platform collects and provides customer-oriented reports/WMG with the help of NCE or uFad. The R&D engineers perform in-depth analysis.
Forty-seven key test cases for new hardware inspection, 4 cases for sub-health inspection and 11 cases for HiSilicon special inspection, ensuring the reliability of new hardware on the live network.
Solution: Replace the hardware or board.

根据故障排查指导书收集数据，反馈给研发接口人戴旭光（00447671）分析确认是否存在风险：
排查方法（http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_18491985.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file&ctype=-1）：
1、确认基带板类型是否为UBBPg1a/g2
2、获取全网BBU运行温度数据（涉及MML:DSP FAN:; DSP BRDTEMP:;）
3、获取全网UBBPg1a和UBBPg2单板存量文件（板+框）
4、获取全网中心层故障日志。

备注：数据收集操作指导：http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_18492333.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file&ctype=-1


Collect data according to the troubleshooting guide and send the data to the R&D contact person Dai Xuguang (00447671) for analysis and confirmation.
Troubleshooting method (http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_18491985.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file&ctype=-1):
1. Check whether the BBP is a UBBPg1a or UBBPg2.
2. Run the DSP FAN command and DSP BRDTEMP command to obtain the BBU operating temperature data on the entire network.
3. Obtain the inventory files of the UBBPg1a and UBBPg2 boards on the entire network (board+subrack).
4. Obtain fault logs at the central layer on the entire network.

Remarks: Data collection guide: http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_18492333.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file&ctype=-1

rows.title: Check the risks of expiration of wireless preconfigured certificate
rows.precaution_title: 关于客户网络中无线预置证书即将过期的风险预警
rows.creator: w00301388
rows.risk_description:
1．If you are not the handler and owner of this task, please kindly transfer it to the correct wireless person.
2. For wireless sites, run the automatic check script (DeviceCertificateCheck_V1.5.zip) on the NMS to obtain the risk information about digital certificates on the live network by using the Digital Certificate Check - iSStar Script Usage Guide V1.1 in the risk check package. (The involved sites will receive the NetCare risk check task.)
3. If the Preconfigured certificate Risks sheet in the check result.xls file is not empty, preconfigured certificates may expire on live network.
4. Any problem, contact HQ for support, GTS/R&D: Wang Lin 00301388/Yang Peng 0006189).

rows.title: Notice on Hardening GU Controller Reliability to enhance the network anti-risk capability.
rows.precaution_title: Notice on Hardening GU Controller Reliability to enhance the network anti-risk capability.
rows.creator: f00199581
rows.risk_description:
heck whether below risk existing in current network or not. if yes, record risk in system to follow up

[Problem Scenario]:Power terminals are carbonized and burnt at multiple sites in high-temperature countries.
[Fault Symptom]:In high-temperature areas, the power terminals of high-power modules are carbonized and burnt.
[Trigger Condition]:1. The stripped length of the power cable is insufficient.The contact resistance becomes large after the insulation layer is pressed. As a result, the power cable is overheated and burnt. 2. The power cable at the ground clip is not well-made and has no shield layer. The insulation of the cable is damaged and short-circuited with the ground clip.

[Check Method]:
1. For sites earlier than SRAN17.1SPC180, extract central-layer fault logs(section 2.4 in the guide) and inventory files(section 2.2 in the guide).
2. In SRAN17.1SPC180 and later versions, the resistance detection solution is incorporated to identify risky sites based on power supply alarm monitoring. RFTEST logs(section 2.6 in the guide) and inventory files(section 2.2 in the guide) need to be extracted to accurately identify high-risk sites.
3、Send the collected inventory files and central-layer fault logs/RFTEST logs to Zhou Cai 0051065 for data analysis.
Refer to the below link for details,
http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_17561981.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file
If you have any questions, contact Ma Chunlei (00330741) and Zhang Tianbo (00621356).
